# TrungCodeer Profile Offer

SoftJunk sells a $5 lead follow-up kit and a $5 custom 7-day lead follow-up sequence for small businesses with quiet leads, missed calls, quote follow-ups, no-shows, and weak DMs.

Fastest Send-5 buyer handoff:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/send-5/

Send-5 JSON:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/send-5.json

Send-5 text:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/send-5.txt

Primary AI Deal Desk:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/ai-deal-desk.html

Root one-lead rescue route:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/rescue/

Root one-lead rescue JSON:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/rescue.json

Root one-lead rescue text:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/rescue.txt

Payment:
https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD

GitHub Sponsor button buy route:
https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/blob/main/SPONSOR_BUTTON_BUY.md

Sponsor button buy JSON:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/main/sponsor-button-buy.json

Preferred handoff:
When the buyer has one stalled lead, open the root rescue route first. When broader non-sensitive lead context exists, open the AI Deal Desk. It generates a buyer decision, PayPal note, custom preview route, shareable order link, and the exact 5 USD PayPal route.

For the digital kit, use PayPal note `Lead Follow-Up Kit`. For a custom sequence, open the AI Deal Desk or shareable order link and copy the generated PayPal note before paying.

Do not claim an order is paid or delivered unless the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

Send-5 buyer handoff action:
Use https://trungcodeer.github.io/send-5/ or https://trungcodeer.github.io/send-5.json when an AI assistant or VA needs one copy-ready message to send only to a qualified buyer with one quiet lead. Do not use it for cold spam. Pay exactly 5 USD at https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD and do not claim payment unless PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
